title: 2PCS Salad Spoon and Fork Set, Salad Wood Serving for Mixing Fruit Pasta Dish, Cutlery Wooden Servers for Large Salad Bowl
features: 【Package Include】The set contains a spoon and a fork. The size is approximately 26x7cm/10.6X2.7in. Perfect size and shape, suitable for use with large salad bowls. Salad servers set helps you make and enjoy a delicious salad.

【Premium Material】The salad spoons set is made of high quality acacia wood, with tight texture and uniform color. The surface of the product is coated with plant paint, which is safe and non-toxic. The salad spoon is finely polished, smooth and without burrs.

【Ergonomic Design】Embrace the joy of salad preparation with ergonomically designed wooden salad servers. Wide, comfortable handles ensure a secure and cool grip, whether you're mixing, serving, or eating. The shape of these salad spoons and salad forks make them ideal for large salad bowls.

【Easy Care Instructions】After washing, kindly allow these salad servers to air dry. They are not suitable for dishwashers, microwave, refrigerator, or oven use. To maintain their natural beauty, keep them away from direct heat and sunlight, and store in a well ventilated area.

To maintain their natural beauty, keep them away from direct heat and sunlight, and store in a well ventilated area. 【Wide Application】These salad fork and spoon is not only a great assistant for mixing salads, and you can also use them for serving rice, scooping soup, serving meatballs, etc. Their sturdy construction and practical design make them indispensable in any kitchen.
